name: io.github.udsrvbest/append-log-mcp
title: Append Log MCP
description: A generic append-only log MCP server. Persist timestamped JSON entries and query them by recency.

environmentVariables.name: APPEND_LOG_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Path to the JSONL log file inside the container.

environmentVariables.name: APPEND_LOG_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of tools to expose. Available: append, query
